title: InvUtils
body: # InvUtil A Minecraft clientside inventory utilities mod # Features ## Hotkeys: - Swap main hand item with tool appropriate for focused block - Swap chestplate/Elytra - Swap tool with (non-) Silk Touch version # Configuration This mod supports Configuration with [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) and [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) installed [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
